metadata.name: Manage an Artist Meet and Greet

description: A limited number of fans have purchased VIP packages that include a pre-show meet and greet with the artist.

nodes.task_description: Generate a guest list of all fans who purchased the VIP package.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls the list from the ticketing system.

nodes.task_description: Set up a check-in station at the designated meet and greet location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent coordinates the setup of the check-in area.

nodes.task_description: Check in guests against the list as they arrive.
Coordinate with the artist's security to manage the flow of guests and ensure the event runs smoothly.

expected_outcome.value: Agent works with the tour manager to execute the meet and greet.
